source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for analytical product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, crisp metrics, and readable multilingual dashboards.
layout: Precise 8px grids, branching data paths, channel-like dividers, layered sediment surfaces, compact analytics cards, and calm dashboard composition.

prompts.label: Transparent Delta motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a stylized but physically plausible overhead river delta channel motif, isolated full subject, no surrounding landscape, no props, no text.
Subject: A branching river mouth delta seen from above: teal water distributary channels splitting and rejoining through silt tan sediment bars with fine reed green marsh edges. The shape should read as one complete natural branching system, like an analytics flow network formed by water.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the delta shape. Keep the motif as a compact island-like branching silhouette suitable for a design-system catalog.
Lighting/mood: clean studio-style top light that preserves water sheen, silt texture, reed detail, and natural color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no maps, no labels, no boats, no buildings, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Delta", derived from a transparent river delta motif cutout: teal water distributary channels, silt tan bars, reed green marsh edges. The system feel is a branching analytics system.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the river delta motif. The board must visibly respect teal water, silt tan, reed green, pale sediment neutrals, and deep channel shadows.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, large readable labels, avoid dense tiny text. Use a precise editorial grid with spacious modules.
Required visible sections: title "Delta", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
UI content direction: analytics dashboard with branching flows, tributary line charts, channel maps, segment filters, conversion split cards, and data tables. Components should be shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI with buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, sidebar navigation, and compact charts.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose clean multilingual product UI guidance, readable labels only.
Style/medium: premium product design system board, quiet analytical SaaS interface, precise grid, 8px card radius, subtle sediment grain texture, fine channel-line icon language, no nested cards.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: teal water, deep estuary teal, silt tan, pale sand, reed green, mud shadow, shell white.
Text: short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a wide 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Delta", the dark counterpart to the light board. It must feel like the same branching analytics system translated to dark mode.
Reference use: Use the transparent river delta motif and light Delta board as references: teal water distributary channels, silt tan bars, reed green marsh edges, sediment grain, branching analytics flows, precise shadcn/tweakcn product UI.
Canvas: landscape orientation only, wide 16:9 board layout. Compose for final 3840x2160. Do not create a square or portrait board.
Layout: three broad horizontal bands across the full wide canvas: top band for title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, and components; middle band for sidebar navigation, analytics dashboard, forms, table, search/command; bottom band for texture, radius, spacing, shadows, semantic tokens, generated asset examples, and icons.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, large readable labels, avoid dense tiny text. Use a precise editorial grid with spacious modules.
Required visible sections: title "Delta", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep estuary teal and mud shadow, light text from shell white and pale sand, accents from river teal and reed green, restrained contrast, subtle sediment grain texture, fine channel-line icon language, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
UI content direction: dark analytics dashboard with branching flows, tributary line charts, channel maps, segment filters, conversion split cards, and data tables. Include buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, sidebar navigation, and compact charts.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; clean multilingual product UI guidance, readable labels only.
Style/medium: premium dark product design system board, quiet analytical SaaS interface, precise grid, 8px card radius, no nested cards.
Text: short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no portrait layout.
